content: Hi Rajesh, is the Sony WH-1000XM5 still available?
Yes Priya, it's still available! I'm in Delhi. Would you like to see it?
Perfect! I'm in Delhi too. Can we meet this weekend at Select Citywalk?
Saturday at 11am works. I'll bring the headphones and box. My number is +91-98765-43202.
Great! See you Saturday. Please share the location once confirmed.
Hi, I'm here at the food court. Are you on your way?
Is the Maruti Swift still available?
Yes, it is! 35,000 km driven. Well maintained.
Can I come see it tomorrow evening?
Sure, 6pm works. I'll share address.
Hello, is the HSR Layout 2BHK still available for rent?
Hi Rahul, yes it's available. When would you like to visit?
I can show you the flat tomorrow morning if that works.
Hi, I'm interested in the Kawasaki Ninja 300. Is it still available?
Yes it is. I've maintained it very well. Track days were occasional.
Could you share more photos of the bike?
Here are some photos I took last week.
Let me know if you'd like to take a test ride!
Hello, is the Samsung QLED TV still available?
Yes it is! It's barely used, bought in Jan. Let me know if you want to see it.
Can you do Rs 65,000?
Meet at 68,000 and you have a deal.
<script>alert('XSS-CHAT')</script>Check this out!
